type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Higher production and effluent flows in 2010.   Releases to air due to changes in incineration of CNCG's (concentrated non condensible gases) in the recovery boiler which is more efficient at capturing sulphur compounds.
Celgar has reported the release of arsenic to both land release and on site disposal.  There was no release to land, only to on site disposal.
Celgar has reported identical values for land releases vs. on-site landfill disposal.  The releases were to the landfill only and not an on site spill.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Must report as we manufacture >10 t/year and use it at >1%

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Total SO2 emissions were less in 2018 than 2017 primarily due to fewer issues on start-up of the mill after the annual maintenance shutdown due to improved coordinated efforts, liquor control, and fewer process issues which caused the mill to go up and down numerous times after the 2017 shutdown. Additionally, operating changes were made prior to the transfer of gases to ensure less CNCG gases were being generated prior to the change in incineration point which resulted in lower SO2.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Must report because we use >10 tonnes on site above the concentration threshold of 1% manufacture.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Increase in total amount of lime deposited in landfill due to more upset conditions in 2023 compared to 2022 as well as annual maintenance shutdown in 2023.
An error in reporting total quantity of recaust (dregs) and ash deposited to landfill was discovered during the review of 2023 data. Error goes back to at least 2017. Dry kg total deposited was being entered into the calculator and was treated as a total wet m3 value, unnecessarily converting the total volume. Error has been corrected in 2023 data.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
Increase in total amount of lime deposited in landfill due to more upset conditions in 2023 compared to 2022 as well as annual maintenance shutdown in 2023.
An error in reporting total quantity of recaust (dregs) and ash deposited to landfill was discovered during the review of 2023 data. Error goes back to at least 2017. Dry kg total deposited was being entered into the calculator and was treated as a total wet m3 value, unnecessarily converting the total volume. Error has been corrected in 2023 data.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: SO2 measured higher in recovery boiler in 2022 due to upset conditions during mill start up and shut downs. SO2 measured higher in power boiler in 2022 due to being the only combustion source for foul gases during shutdown and start up periods.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Improvements to dissolving tank scrubber decreased releases to air. Air emissions were elevated in 2021 due to failure of dissolving tank scrubber material. Replaced scrubber packing material in 2021. Emissions decreased in 2022 below reporting threshold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Releases to air - the power boiler ran on hog for more days in 2022 compared to 2021. Lab results for 2022 ash sample measured higher concentration of arsenic compared to 2021 with one one sample submitted in 2022. 
Releases to air - some sources had M3 source testing, some sources had E2 - published emission factor for basis of calculation.
Releases to water bodies - more effluent treatment operating days in 2022 than 2021. Measured concentration of arsenic in final effluent was not significantly different between 2021 and 2022.
